title: Uniswap Documentation
description: Official docs for Uniswap — the leading decentralized exchange protocol. Learn how AMMs, liquidity pools, and swaps work.

title: Solidity Documentation
description: The official Solidity language documentation. Essential reading for anyone writing smart contracts on EVM-compatible chains.

title: Ethereum.org Learn
description: Ethereum's official learning hub. Covers wallets, DeFi, NFTs, DAOs, and the fundamentals of how Ethereum works.

title: OpenSea NFT Guide
description: A beginner-friendly guide to understanding NFTs, how to buy and sell them, and what makes them valuable.

title: Hardhat Developer Docs
description: Hardhat is the most popular Ethereum development environment. Learn to compile, test, and deploy smart contracts locally.

title: Alchemy Web3 Road to Web3
description: A 10-week hands-on program by Alchemy to go from zero to building real Web3 projects with Solidity and JavaScript.

title: DAOhaus DAO Handbook
description: A comprehensive guide to understanding DAOs — what they are, how they govern, how to start one, and real-world examples.

title: CryptoZombies
description: Learn Solidity by building your own crypto-collectible game. One of the most popular interactive Solidity tutorials.

title: Aave Protocol Docs
description: Learn how Aave's lending and borrowing protocol works, including flash loans, interest rates, and liquidity.

title: Thirdweb Gaming SDK
description: Build blockchain-powered games with Thirdweb's gaming SDK. Supports NFT items, on-chain economies, and wallet integration.

title: Ethers.js Documentation
description: Ethers.js is the go-to JavaScript library for interacting with Ethereum. Learn to connect wallets, read blockchain data, and send transactions.

title: Snapshot Governance Docs
description: Snapshot is the standard off-chain voting platform for DAOs. Learn how to create proposals and set up governance for your community.

title: Polygon Developer Docs
description: Official documentation for building on Polygon — Ethereum's leading Layer 2 scaling solution.

title: NFT School
description: Protocol Labs' free educational resource for understanding NFT standards, IPFS storage, and how to mint NFTs properly.

title: The Foundry Book
description: Foundry is a fast, modern smart contract testing framework written in Rust. This book covers everything from setup to advanced testing patterns.

title: DeFiLlama Analytics
description: Track TVL, protocol rankings, and DeFi ecosystem metrics across all chains. Great for understanding the DeFi landscape.

title: Axie Infinity Whitepaper
description: Deep dive into the Axie Infinity play-to-earn model, tokenomics, and how blockchain gaming economies are designed.

title: IPFS Documentation
description: Learn how the InterPlanetary File System works and how to use it for decentralized storage in your Web3 apps.

title: Compound Governance Guide
description: How Compound's on-chain governance works — proposals, voting, timelock, and how token holders participate in protocol decisions.

title: Web3 University
description: A free, structured curriculum for learning Web3 development — from blockchain basics all the way to building full dApps.
